scripts.pack:widget: mkdir -p dist && rm -f dist/zoho-crm-widget.zip && zip -r dist/zoho-crm-widget.zip plugin-manifest.json app -x '*/node_modules/*' '.DS_Store' 'app/.DS_Store'
scripts.pack:appsail: mkdir -p dist && rm -f dist/appsail-backend.zip && cd appsail-nodejs && zip -r ../dist/appsail-backend.zip app-config.json index.js backend.cjs package.json package-lock.json data -x 'node_modules/*' '.DS_Store'
scripts.pack:all: npm run pack:widget && npm run pack:appsail
